description: Two game servers with low player populations need to be merged to improve the matchmaking experience.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the player population trends for all servers to identify the best candidates for merging.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent identifies two specific servers with consistently low populations.

nodes.task_description: Check for any potential conflicts, such as players with the same name on both servers.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates a list of name conflicts that will need to be resolved.

nodes.task_description: Develop a detailed project plan for the server merge, including communication to players, downtime, and the conflict resolution process.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a comprehensive plan for the merge.
